description: Per-village shopkeeper dialogue. Keyed by village_id then shop_type (item/blacksmith/black_magic/white_magic). Each entry has 5 lines: greeting (on shop open), browse (while browsing inventory), buy (after purchase), sell (after sell), farewell (on shop close). Speaker is resolved from ShopkeeperData.get_shopkeeper_for_type; dialogue adds per-village personality on top.

item.greeting: Welcome, friend. The herbs came in fresh this morning.
item.browse: Take your time. We've been here a hundred years, and we'll be here tomorrow.
item.buy: A sensible choice. May it serve you on the road.
item.sell: I'll take that off your hands. Fair trade is fair trade.
item.farewell: Travel safely. The cave takes its due, so mind your footing.

blacksmith.greeting: You look like you've been in a scrape. Need steel?
blacksmith.browse: Feel the blade. Don't just look at it — steel tells you what it's for.
blacksmith.buy: It'll hold. That's all I can promise about any steel.
blacksmith.sell: That blade's worn through. I'll take it for the iron, nothing more.
blacksmith.farewell: Swing true. Or don't swing — that works too.

black_magic.greeting: You've come seeking... elsewhere. Elsewhere is in the back.
black_magic.browse: Browse. The books do not bite. Most of them.
black_magic.buy: You are certain. I will note your certainty, for later.
black_magic.sell: I will take this back. It may still remember you.
black_magic.farewell: Close the door behind you. The draft disagrees with the candles.

white_magic.greeting: Bless you, traveler. You've walked a long road.
white_magic.browse: The prayers are arranged by urgency. The urgent ones are on the left.
white_magic.buy: May it keep you whole. Whole-ish, at least.
white_magic.sell: It has served. Let it serve someone else now.
white_magic.farewell: Go in peace. The cave's door is not the last door.

item.greeting: A guest. Please wipe your boots. The moss takes offense.
item.browse: Everything is labeled in the old script. If you cannot read it, I can translate. Slowly.
item.buy: An acceptable choice for a human. The forest approves, I believe.
item.sell: The tree will assess the offering. You are fortunate — it seems willing.
item.farewell: Walk lightly. The roots remember every footstep.

blacksmith.greeting: You want — forgive me — iron? We prefer silver and living wood.
blacksmith.browse: The silverwork is on the upper shelves. The lower shelves are for guests who insist.
blacksmith.buy: A choice made. I will not ask what it is for.
blacksmith.sell: I accept it. I will melt it down and make it something gentler.
blacksmith.farewell: The canopy parts for the humble. Be humble.

black_magic.greeting: You have come to the Elder Grove. The Grove has agreed to see you.
black_magic.browse: These are not spells. They are agreements. Read them twice.
black_magic.buy: The agreement is witnessed. The witness was the tree.
black_magic.sell: Returned. The tree thanks you for its restitution.
black_magic.farewell: Leave without looking back. The Grove prefers it that way.

white_magic.greeting: Welcome. The singing has been for you this hour.
white_magic.browse: Each blessing is a song. You will hear it when you learn it.
white_magic.buy: Sung into you. Carry it carefully — songs can forget themselves.
white_magic.sell: I will hold it again. The song rests now.
white_magic.farewell: May the canopy remember you kindly.

item.browse: Supplies on the left. If it's frozen, hit it. If it isn't, don't.
item.buy: Taken. Pay when your hands work.
item.farewell: Don't die out there. The pass gets mean after sundown.

blacksmith.greeting: You need a blade or an axe. Those are the choices.
blacksmith.browse: All honest iron. No enchanted nonsense.
blacksmith.buy: Yours. Sharpen it yourself — I don't do favors.
blacksmith.sell: I'll take the steel. The rest goes in the forge.
blacksmith.farewell: Cold kills more than steel does. Mind that.

black_magic.greeting: The fire's under the floor. Mind the trapdoor.
black_magic.browse: Whatever you pick, the wind's already carrying word of it.
black_magic.buy: Done. Don't speak the word above ground.
black_magic.sell: I'll take it. The old ones keep the books.
black_magic.farewell: Walk fast. Wind carries things it shouldn't.

white_magic.greeting: The halls of Ullra welcome you. Remove the frost first.
white_magic.browse: Prayers are chipped into the pillars. Find one that suits your winter.
white_magic.buy: Carved into your name. It will find you when the cold does.
white_magic.sell: Returned to stone. All prayer is borrowed, eventually.
white_magic.farewell: Walk warm. If you can't walk warm, walk fast.

item.greeting: Oh. A visitor. We don't see many. Most leave before the third day.
item.browse: The bottles on the top shelf are fine. The ones on the bottom shelf are also fine, but differently.
item.buy: Yours. Don't open it at night. That's friendly advice.
item.sell: I'll take it. The swamp takes everything eventually. I'm just faster.
item.farewell: Safe travels. If you hear your name called from the fog, it's not for you. Probably.

blacksmith.greeting: Steel. Fine. I can do that. It won't rust. Much.
blacksmith.browse: The edges hold. The handles are bone — local supply. You get used to it.
blacksmith.buy: Sold. Don't bury it. It comes back up.
blacksmith.sell: Mine now. I'll melt it tonight. Nothing personal.
blacksmith.farewell: Walk straight out. Don't turn at the crooked tree. You know the one.

black_magic.greeting: You came. I thought you would. The bog told me someone was coming.
black_magic.browse: The spells are not in books. They are in jars. Do not shake the jars.
black_magic.buy: Bought. The jar will keep you awake for three nights. That is the price.
black_magic.sell: Received. I will put it back in the pond. The pond will decide.
black_magic.farewell: If you find a path you don't recognize, take it. That was mine.

white_magic.greeting: Come to the lantern. The lantern is the only honest light here.
white_magic.browse: The prayers are soft. Soft is what grows here.
white_magic.buy: Spoken into your hair. You will feel it when the fog does.
white_magic.sell: Released. The swamp is gentler than it seems. Sometimes.
white_magic.farewell: Carry the lantern if you can. Leave it if you must. It will find its way back.

item.greeting: Welcome to the forge town. Mind the sparks.
item.browse: Everything's rated for heat. The tonics keep in the volcano's shadow better than cool places.
item.buy: Wrapped. Don't drop it on the coals.
item.sell: I'll take it. The furnace likes variety.
item.farewell: Watch the lava flows on the road east. They've been moody.

blacksmith.greeting: You came to the right place. Everyone's a blacksmith here. I'm just the one who charges money.
blacksmith.browse: Every blade was quenched in the caldera. They remember the heat.
blacksmith.buy: Yours. Re-quench it in a year. Blades get lazy.
blacksmith.sell: Back to the fire it goes. Nothing wasted in Ironhaven.
blacksmith.farewell: Keep your steel hot. Or at least warm. Cold steel's a bad omen around here.

black_magic.greeting: Fire magic, you want? We've got the best fire magic. We invented some of it by accident.
black_magic.browse: All fire-adjacent. The volcano imbues everything — you can smell it.
black_magic.buy: Bought. Don't cast it in the forge. Everyone's been there. It's not funny.
black_magic.sell: I'll take it. Back into the rotation.
black_magic.farewell: Walk carefully. The cobblestones are hot till noon.

white_magic.greeting: The smokehouse chapel welcomes you. Prayer is best heard over the bellows.
white_magic.browse: Each blessing is forge-annealed. They don't break easy.
white_magic.sell: The forge receives it. Grace doesn't spoil in heat.
white_magic.farewell: Go warm. Ironhaven always goes warm.

item.greeting: A traveler! Welcome to the camp. Water's four coppers a skin.
item.browse: Caravan stock. Fresh from the last run, or the run before that.
item.buy: A bargain. Don't tell the next caravan what you paid.
item.sell: I'll take it. There's a market two dunes over who'll want it.
item.farewell: Walk at night. The sand is a liar by day.

blacksmith.greeting: Hot work in the heat. You came at a good hour — I'm in a bad mood and I give discounts.
blacksmith.browse: Desert steel. The sand polishes everything it doesn't eat.
blacksmith.buy: Yours. Oil it tonight. The sand's patient.
blacksmith.sell: Swapped. The caravan will want it.
blacksmith.farewell: The oasis is kind. The road is not. Pack extra water.

black_magic.greeting: You found us. Most don't. We move the tent every six days.
black_magic.browse: Desert magic is sand magic. Everything here shifts.
black_magic.buy: Bought. The spell likes to come undone in humidity. We're in no danger of that.
black_magic.sell: Taken. I'll barter it in the next camp.
black_magic.farewell: The stars hold. Walk by them, not by the sun.

white_magic.greeting: Peace to you, traveler. Tea first, commerce after.
white_magic.browse: Prayers from seven deserts. Each one a different flavor of grace.
white_magic.buy: Drunk in. Grace keeps better in dry country.
white_magic.sell: Returned. Someone else's thirst will find it.
white_magic.farewell: May the wells rise to meet you.

item.greeting: Hi there! Did you sign in at the front desk?
item.browse: Everything's clearly labeled. The HOA requires clear labeling. You're welcome.
item.buy: Great choice! This one's really popular on the block.
item.sell: Sure thing. Receipt's in your folder — you'll want that for insurance.
item.farewell: Have a nice day! Remember, trash pickup is Thursday.

blacksmith.greeting: Oh! You need a weapon? Well. That's — that's something we can discuss.
blacksmith.browse: Browse away. It's all up to code. I had it inspected.
blacksmith.buy: Good pick! Been meaning to move that one off the display.
blacksmith.sell: Sure, I can take that. The yard's got space for another one.
blacksmith.farewell: Take care of yourself out there. And please — not on the neighborhood.

black_magic.greeting: ...you followed the notice? Come in. Quickly. And shut the blinds.
black_magic.browse: Keep your voice down. The HOA does not know about this corner.
black_magic.buy: A choice. I am impressed. Most come in and leave.
black_magic.sell: I'll take it. It will not be missed, and neither will you, if this conversation is discovered.
black_magic.farewell: Leave the way you came. Forget the notice. Forget the blinds.

white_magic.greeting: Welcome to the community prayer corner! Have you registered?
white_magic.browse: Everything's organized by category. Category A is Sunday morning service.
white_magic.buy: Lovely choice. I'll have the team pray over it tonight.
white_magic.sell: We can receive donations. The program is 501(c)(3), of course.
white_magic.farewell: Stay blessed! There's a potluck next week — you should come.

item.greeting: Welcome. You have arrived at 4:06. Please wait one minute. We open at 4:07.
item.browse: The catalog is in the third drawer. The second drawer is also the catalog but for a prior quarter.
item.buy: An efficient selection. Your efficiency is noted.
item.sell: Accepted. It will be entered on the ledger. The ledger runs one day behind reality. This is standard.
item.farewell: Good afternoon. Tea is at 4:07. We have four seconds.

blacksmith.greeting: Welcome. Your sword is out of specification. I will measure it.
blacksmith.browse: Each blade has a calibration card. Please review the card before the blade.
blacksmith.buy: The measurements are acceptable. Accept delivery.
blacksmith.sell: Surrender the blade. I will archive it in the out-of-specification rack.
blacksmith.farewell: Your next inspection is in ninety days. Mind the calendar.

black_magic.greeting: The shop opens for you. Close the door. Pressure must be maintained.
black_magic.browse: Browse the pressure-gauged shelves. Shelf 4 is at 4.7 atmospheres. Do not exhale there.
black_magic.buy: Selected. The payment is automatic. The cost is calibrated.
black_magic.sell: Surrendered. It will be added to the reclaim line.

white_magic.greeting: Welcome. The chapel opens on the sevens. You are punctual.
white_magic.browse: The prayers are in order by efficacy. The most efficacious are prohibitively priced. This is also efficient.
white_magic.buy: Blessed. The efficacy will be measured on your next visit.
white_magic.sell: Accepted. The grace is transferable only twice. You are the first.
white_magic.farewell: Good afternoon. Do not miss tea.

item.greeting: Welcome to the company store. Present your company token.
item.browse: Inventory is on Line 3. Line 3 is always running.
item.buy: Acquired. The deduction comes off your next shift.
item.sell: I'll take it. The salvage yard is around back.
item.farewell: Your shift ends at the standard hour. The standard hour has not been announced. Watch the signal tower.

blacksmith.greeting: You're looking for hardware. You'll want the warehouse. Here's the claim form.
blacksmith.browse: All stock is manifest-tracked. Do not lift anything without signing.
blacksmith.buy: Claim approved. Hardware has been released to you.
blacksmith.sell: I will receive the item. Please also sign the release form.
blacksmith.farewell: Shift change in seven minutes. Good luck.

black_magic.greeting: You are off-manifest. However, I have a variance form.
black_magic.browse: The... materials... are in the back room. Please be careful with the paperwork.
black_magic.buy: Approved. Do not mention the paperwork to the foreman.
black_magic.sell: Accepted. I will file it under 'salvage, unlisted'.
black_magic.farewell: Forget where the back room is. It helps the variance.

white_magic.greeting: Welcome to the chapel. The shift chaplain is on break. You have me.
white_magic.browse: Prayers are on the board. Line 1 is Monday. Line 7 is also Monday, because Monday is long.
white_magic.buy: A good choice. I'll log it on the prayer board.
white_magic.sell: The chapel accepts donations. The chapel files them as 'prayer'.
white_magic.farewell: Your shift is sacred. So is the break. See you on Sunday.

item.greeting: > welcome. list of items follows. press up arrow to recall last purchase.
item.browse: $ browse --verbose. pipe the output through less if it doesn't fit.
item.buy: $ buy item_id=your_pick. transaction complete. exit code: 0.
item.sell: $ sell. receipt printed to stdout. record kept in /var/log/transactions.
item.farewell: $ logout. your session has ended. thank you for shopping from user-space.

blacksmith.greeting: > hardware shop. you need root to enter the kernel-grade aisle.
blacksmith.browse: $ ls weapons/. the metadata is the spec sheet. read it.
blacksmith.buy: $ commit. your purchase has been added to the index.
blacksmith.sell: $ sell. the item is now in /tmp. it will be garbage-collected at end of day.
blacksmith.farewell: $ exit. free() called successfully on your shopping session.

black_magic.browse: $ grep -r 'power' /var/forbidden/. results pending your privilege level.
black_magic.buy: $ sudo install. you have been granted the spell. do not lose the receipt.
black_magic.sell: $ sudo rm. the spell has been deallocated. the memory is now free.
black_magic.farewell: $ logout. do not try to reconnect. there is nothing to reconnect to.

white_magic.greeting: > grace service listening on port 443. authenticate to proceed.
white_magic.browse: $ ls --blessed. the list is alphabetical by patron saint.
white_magic.sell: $ uninstall. the blessing has been returned to the pool. thank you for your service.
white_magic.farewell: $ logout. may your session resume in another process.

item.greeting: You arrived. An item is here. The item has been here.
item.browse: Look. Take. Or don't. The exchange is the exchange.
item.buy: You have selected. Selection is a form of having.
item.sell: You are giving. That is a form of not-having. Both are acceptable.
item.farewell: You leave. The exchange remains. The exchange is the same exchange.

blacksmith.greeting: Welcome to The Remainder. Nothing here was optimized away.
blacksmith.browse: The pieces are shaped like what they do. You will notice.
blacksmith.buy: You have the blade. The blade was made for being-had.
blacksmith.sell: I will take it. It will become The Remainder again. Everything does.
blacksmith.farewell: Go. Use it. Use is a form of remainder.

black_magic.greeting: There is no shop here. This is acceptable.
black_magic.browse: There is nothing to browse. This is also acceptable.
black_magic.buy: Nothing purchased. The void refunds in kind.
black_magic.sell: Nothing sold. The absence has been preserved.
black_magic.farewell: You leave with what you brought. That is the trade.

white_magic.greeting: The Recall remembers spells that used to exist.
white_magic.browse: The index is in order. The order is: forgotten, almost-forgotten, remembered.
white_magic.buy: You have the memory. The memory will teach itself to your hand.
white_magic.sell: I will take it back. The memory prefers to be shared. Somewhere.
white_magic.farewell: Go. Remember. That is enough for the Recall.
